about.subtitle: Welcome to CEC Nepal
about.title: Pioneering Green Energy Solutions

potentialBox.heading: Nepal's Hydropower Potential
potentialBox.text: Theoretically, Nepal has a hydropower potential of over 83,000 MW, of which only about 42,000 MW could be considered technically and economically feasible.

about.intro: Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd. (CEC Nepal) is Nepal's leading engineering consultancy firm specializing in hydropower, renewable energy, and infrastructure development.

history.milestone: From a small consultancy to Nepal's most trusted hydropower engineering firm
